text: A bee is an insect known for pollination and, in some species, honey production
original_text: A bee is an insect known for pollination and, in some species, honey production.

text: bees help many plants reproduce by moving pollen between flowers
original_text: Bees help many plants reproduce by moving pollen between flowers.

text: honeybees live in colonies with workers, drones, and a queen
original_text: Honeybees live in colonies with workers, drones, and a queen.

text: bees communicate food locations through movement and chemical signals
original_text: Bees communicate food locations through movement and chemical signals.
The meatball considers bees tiny flying productivity managers.
